data.title: AI TRENDS | EU Commission to Meet with Anthropic Today
data.description: The European Union Commission is scheduled to hold a meeting with Anthropic today. According to Jin10, this meeting is part of ongoing discussions between the EU and AI companies to address regulatory and ethical considerations in the development and deployment of artificial intelligence technologies. Anthropic, known for its advancements in AI safety and research, is expected to engage in dialogue about the future of AI governance and collaboration with European entities. This meeting underscores the EU's commitment to fostering responsible AI innovation while ensuring compliance with its regulatory frameworks.

data.title: Perp DEX Market Sees Trading Volume Recovery
data.description:
On April 14, according to DefiLlama data, the on-chain perpetual decentralized exchange (Perp DEX) market has experienced a resurgence in trading volume. According to BlockBeats, the HIP-3 ecosystem project TradeXYZ has seen a recovery in trading volume, although its open interest has declined. Meanwhile, Hyperliquid's overall open interest has reached its highest level since February this year, with the current growth in positions not entirely stemming from traditional markets.

The current rankings for major Perp DEX trading volumes are as follows:

Hyperliquid: 24-hour trading volume is approximately $7.41 billion, with open interest reaching $8.23 billion.

TradeXYZ: 24-hour trading volume is approximately $2.47 billion, with open interest reaching $1.87 billion.

Aster: 24-hour trading volume is approximately $2.62 billion, with open interest reaching $2.07 billion.

EdgeX: 24-hour trading volume is approximately $2.15 billion, with open interest reaching $964 million.

Lighter: 24-hour trading volume is approximately $1.83 billion, with open interest reaching $761 million.

Pacifica: 24-hour trading volume is approximately $485 million, with open interest reaching $85.05 million.

data.title: Binance Enhances Trading Experience with New Tools
data.description:
Binance announced on X the introduction of three new features designed to enhance the trading experience for professional traders. These tools aim to streamline operations and improve efficiency in executing trades.

The first feature, Meme Rush Shortcuts, allows users to customize keyboard shortcuts for quicker access to X content and faster order placement. This tool is designed to give traders an edge by enabling rapid decision-making and execution. The second feature, Quick Buy/Sell Shortcuts on Detail Pages, offers precise keyboard operations to boost trading efficiency. Traders can now execute buy and sell orders directly from detail pages, minimizing the time spent navigating through multiple screens.

The third feature, Hotspot Radar Bulk Buy, enables traders to create custom buying strategies for multiple tokens simultaneously. This tool is particularly useful for those looking to capitalize on market trends by purchasing several tokens in one go. These enhancements reflect Binance's commitment to providing professional traders with advanced tools to optimize their trading strategies and improve overall performance. Users are encouraged to explore these new features to maximize their trading potential on the platform.

data.title: JPMorgan's Q1 Stock Sales and Trading Revenue Exceeds Expectations
data.description: JPMorgan Chase & Co. reported its first-quarter stock sales and trading revenue at $4.48 billion. According to Jin10, this figure surpassed market expectations, which were set at $4.31 billion.

data.title: Cardano Network Sees Significant Surge in Activity
data.description: Cardano has experienced a notable increase in network activity over the past three months. According to NS3.AI, the number of daily active addresses on the Cardano network surged by 1464%, reaching 12,000. Additionally, Everstake data revealed that ADA transactions rose by 4278%, totaling 120,000 during the same timeframe.

data.title: RaveDAO Enters Top 30 Cryptocurrencies After Price Surge
data.description: RaveDAO has made a significant leap into the top 30 cryptocurrencies by market capitalization. According to NS3.AI, the cryptocurrency RAVE is currently trading at $14.38 following a notable increase over the past week. This surge has propelled RaveDAO into a prominent position within the crypto market.

data.title: Wells Fargo Reports Q1 2026 Revenue Increase
data.description: Wells Fargo (WFC.N) reported its first-quarter revenue for 2026 at $21.45 billion, marking an increase from $20.149 billion in the same period last year. According to Jin10, the market had anticipated revenue of $21.756 billion for this quarter.

data.title: Crypto-Related Stocks Rise in U.S. Pre-Market Trading
data.description: U.S. pre-market trading saw a rise in crypto-related stocks, with Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) experiencing a 3.32% increase. According to NS3.AI, SBET led the gains with a 3.88% rise.

data.title: The Influence and Boundaries of Stablecoin Issuers
data.description: The role and authority of stablecoin issuers in the financial ecosystem are under scrutiny. According to PANews, questions are being raised about the extent of their power and the limitations they face. As stablecoins become increasingly integral to digital transactions, understanding the influence of their issuers is crucial. The discussion centers on how these entities navigate regulatory frameworks and their impact on the broader financial landscape. The debate continues as stakeholders seek clarity on the responsibilities and constraints of stablecoin issuers.

data.title: Italian Premier Meloni Cautious on Russian Gas Amid Energy Price Surge
data.description: Italian Premier Giorgia Meloni has expressed caution regarding the possibility of utilizing Russian gas, despite the ongoing conflict in Iran leading to increased energy prices and supply constraints. Bloomberg posted on X that Meloni emphasized the need for careful consideration before making any decisions related to energy imports from Russia. The conflict in Iran has exacerbated global energy challenges, prompting countries to explore alternative sources to mitigate the impact on their economies. Meloni's statement reflects Italy's strategic approach to navigating the complex geopolitical landscape while addressing domestic energy needs.

data.title: ZachXBT: Fake Ledger Live app leads to theft of over $9.5 million in assets, affecting more than 50 victims.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst ZachXBT, a fake Ledger Live app was once available on the Apple App Store, resulting in the theft of assets from over 50 users, totaling approximately $9.5 million. The stolen funds involved various assets including Bitcoin, EVM chain assets, TRON, Solana, and XRP. The stolen funds were subsequently transferred through over 150 KuCoin deposit addresses and laundered using a centralized coin mixing service called AudiA6. Data shows that the largest single loss reached $3.23 million. The app has recently been removed from the Apple App Store.

data.title: Nauru Appoints Crypto Entrepreneur as Trade Commissioner to Boost Digital Asset Strategy
data.description: Nauru has appointed crypto entrepreneur Dadvan Yousuf as its international trade commissioner, aiming to enhance its digital asset strategy and attract global investment. According to NS3.AI, President David Adeang stated that Yousuf will collaborate with virtual asset service providers, financial institutions, and technology firms. This appointment comes after the nation passed legislation less than a year ago establishing the Command Ridge Virtual Asset Authority.

data.title: Whales Close Long Positions on Hyperliquid, Totaling $17.78 Million
data.description:
On April 14, significant trading activity was observed on Hyperliquid, with five major investors closing long positions worth a total of $17.78 million. According to BlockBeats, these transactions included 5,016.1 ETH, valued at approximately $11.975 million, and 77.9 BTC, valued at around $5.8064 million.

The largest transaction was executed by a whale from the address starting with 0x7e4, who closed a long position of 4,500 ETH, amounting to approximately $10.74 million, with an average closing price of $2,382 per ETH.

data.title: Johnson & Johnson Raises 2026 Operating Sales Forecast
data.description: Johnson & Johnson has revised its operating sales forecast for 2026, projecting a range of $99.7 billion to $100.7 billion. According to Jin10, this new estimate surpasses the previous forecast of $99.5 billion to $100.5 billion. The adjustment reflects the company's optimistic outlook for its future performance.

data.title: Scott Bessent Advises Fed to Delay Rate Cuts Amid Rising Fuel Costs
data.description: Scott Bessent has advised the Federal Reserve to postpone interest rate cuts due to the ongoing conflict in Iran, which is driving up fuel prices and complicating the inflation outlook. According to NS3.AI, the Federal Reserve's March minutes highlighted concerns that elevated oil prices could increase inflation in the short term, potentially delaying a return to the 2% target and affecting core prices if the trend continues.

data.title: Sui and BNB Ecosystem Launch AIA Fund to Advance AI Integration
data.description:
Sui and the BNB ecosystem have announced the establishment of the AIA Ecosystem Fund, focusing on the integration of 'AI Agent + Physical AI'. According to Foresight News, the fund aims to incubate and accelerate the development of next-generation AI applications with autonomous decision-making capabilities, extending AI technology from blockchain intelligence to real-world applications.

The fund's investment strategy targets two main areas: AI Agent projects, which possess autonomous decision-making, on-chain execution, and multi-agent collaboration capabilities; and Physical AI projects, which extend AI reasoning capabilities to real-world hardware infrastructure and computational optimization.

Currently, the AIA Ecosystem Fund has completed strategic investments in two projects during the seed round: AliceAI, an AI-driven predictive market decision system that compresses multi-source, fragmented asymmetric information into a single, immutable decision signal, covering scenarios such as crypto markets, sports events, political issues, and public events; and ASIC AI chips, which feature hardware-level deep customization for inference computation characteristics of the Transformer architecture. The design of specialized inference paths allows the chip to handle higher token throughput density under the same power budget, aiming to reduce the unit token processing cost to less than one-tenth of current mainstream GPU solutions while significantly lowering inference latency.

DeAgentAI has developed a minimal entropy consensus mechanism to address three core challenges faced by AI Agents in distributed environments: identity consistency, state continuity, and result credibility. The initiative is committed to creating a truly reliable on-chain AI agent ecosystem.

data.title: Ethereum's Saturn Protocol Faces Critical Vulnerabilities
data.description:
On April 14, security firm Innora released a report highlighting two critical vulnerabilities in the Ethereum-based financial protocol, Saturn. According to BlockBeats, these issues pose significant risks to user funds.

The first vulnerability, known as the withdrawal freeze bug, could potentially lock all user funds under normal business operations. This freeze could last a minimum of 30 days and, in extreme cases, indefinitely, without any hacker intervention as the protocol itself can trigger it.

The second issue involves a privileged address within the protocol that can legally intercept up to 33.33% of funds per operation. Based on current data, this could result in a single interception of approximately $157,000, with a theoretical total risk reaching up to $4.26 million.

Innora noted that over 90% of Saturn's assets are managed off-chain by the privileged address, requiring complete trust from users. As of the report's release, these vulnerabilities remain unaddressed.

data.title: Cryptocurrency stocks generally rose in pre-market trading in the US, with MSTR up 3.32%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, crypto stocks generally rose in pre-market trading in the US, with MARA up 2.08%, CRCL up 3.09%, SBET up 3.88%, ABTC up 1.04%, and MSTR up 3.32%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: Bank of England Governor's Speech May Affect Pound, ING Analyst Says
data.description: Francesco Pesole, an analyst at ING, stated in a report that Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey's speech later today might downplay expectations of an interest rate hike, potentially putting pressure on the pound. According to Jin10, Pesole believes Bailey may maintain a balanced tone, suggesting a current preference to hold rates steady. Pesole noted that the Bank of England is unlikely to raise rates as anticipated, which could drive the euro-pound exchange rate towards the 0.88 level. Data from the London Stock Exchange Group indicates that the market expects a 40 basis point rate hike by the end of the year.

data.title: U.S. Small Business Confidence Declines in March
data.description: The NFIB Small Business Optimism Index for the United States fell to 95.8 in March, missing expectations of 98, according to Jin10. The previous value was recorded at 98.8, indicating a decrease in confidence among small businesses. This decline reflects ongoing challenges faced by small enterprises in the current economic environment.
